User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system, either a student or an admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity, matches Firebase Auth UID.

role.description: Role of the user (e.g., student, admin).

course.description: The course the student is enrolled in.

id.description: Unique identifier for the program entity.

briefDescription.description: A short, one-sentence description for program previews.

description.description: A long, detailed description of the program.

startDate.description: Start date and time of the program.

endDate.description: End date and time of the program.

venue.description: Location where the program will be held.

organizerUnit.description: The department or unit organizing the program.

adminId.description: Reference to the User (admin) who created the program.

imageUrl.description: URL of the program's poster image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the program was created.

Registration.title: Registration
Registration.description: Represents a user's registration for a specific program.

id.description: Unique identifier for the registration record.

registeredAt.description: Timestamp when the user registered for the program.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Represents a user's attendance record for a program.

id.description: Unique identifier for the attendance record.

checkInTime.description: The timestamp when the user checked in.

Certificate.title: Certificate
Certificate.description: Represents a digital certificate issued to a user for a program.

programId.description: Reference to the Program for which the certificate was issued.

userId.description: Reference to the User who received the certificate.

certificateNumber.description: A unique number or code for the certificate.

issuedAt.description: The date the certificate was issued.

ActivityEvidence.title: ActivityEvidence
ActivityEvidence.description: Represents the evidence of participation submitted by a student for a program.

id.description: Unique identifier for the evidence record.

user_id.description: Reference to the User who submitted the evidence.

studentName.description: Full name of the student for easy reference.

programname.description: Name of the program for easy reference.

submissionDate.description: Timestamp when the evidence was submitted.

image_url.description: URL of the uploaded evidence image.

definition.description: Stores details for all programs and events.
Stores registration records for a program. Nested under programs for easy querying of all participants for an event.
Stores attendance check-in records for a program. Nested for efficient queries by program.
Stores certificates issued to a specific user. Nested under the user to ensure privacy and ownership.
Stores evidence of participation submitted by a user for a specific program. Nested under user for ownership-based security.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore structure is designed for scalability and security. Publicly accessible data like 'programs' resides in a top-level collection. User-specific data that requires privacy, such as 'certificates' and 'activity_evidence', is nested within that user's document path to simplify ownership-based security rules. Program-specific subcollections like 'registrations' and 'attendance' are nested under each program, which allows for efficient querying of all participants for a given event, a common requirement for administrators. This model balances query efficiency with a strong, user-centric security posture.
